title: Feature to emptying the Trash in one go and amend the default number of days items are held in the trash
excerpt:

posts.author: FallonPC (Fay Lewin)
posts.cookedHtml:
My trash fills up very quickly ans it can be time consuming to empty a line at a time. It would be good to have a way to empty the trash in one go.

Also, to manage how much is held there, it would be helpful to be able to adjust the number of days something sits in the trash before it is permanently deleted.
